hero.subheadline: I'm Sabbir Hossain — a web developer with 7+ years crafting conversion-focused digital experiences. I've helped 100+ businesses grow through stunning, strategic websites.

about.name: Sabbir Hossain
about.description: Hi, I'm Sabbir — a web developer specializing in building high-converting, business-focused websites. Over the past 7+ years, I've helped 100+ businesses across various industries transform their online presence into powerful revenue-generating machines.
about.subDescription: I don't just build pretty websites — I build strategic digital assets engineered to convert visitors into paying customers, leveraging data-driven UX, performance optimization, and proven conversion psychology.
achievements: Average 3x ROI for clients within 6 months
Expert in WordPress, WooCommerce & Custom Builds

services.title: WordPress Development
services.description: Custom WordPress websites built for speed, security, and conversions. From blogs to complex business platforms.

services.title: Business Websites
services.description: Authority-building business websites designed to attract, engage, and convert your ideal customers.

services.title: Landing Page Design
services.description: High-converting landing pages engineered with proven CRO psychology to maximize campaign ROI.

services.title: Website Redesign
services.description: Transform your outdated website into a modern, conversion-focused powerhouse without losing SEO equity.

services.title: E-Commerce Development
services.description: Full-featured WooCommerce stores with optimized checkout flows, inventory management, and payment integration.

services.title: Speed Optimization
services.description: Achieve 95+ PageSpeed scores. Faster websites rank higher, convert better, and retain visitors longer.

services.title: SEO-Friendly Development
services.description: Every site built with technical SEO foundations — structured data, Core Web Vitals, semantic HTML.

services.title: UI/UX Design
services.description: Research-driven UI/UX design that guides users to conversion through intuitive flows and strategic layouts.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: Deep-dive into your business goals, target audience, competitors, and conversion objectives.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: Wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity UI design with a focus on conversion architecture.

steps.title: Development
steps.description: Pixel-perfect development with clean code, fast load times, and mobile-first excellence.

steps.title: Launch
steps.description: Rigorous QA testing, SEO setup, performance optimization, and smooth go-live handoff.

steps.title: Optimization
steps.description: Post-launch analysis, A/B testing, conversion rate optimization, and continuous improvements.
